raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/2023 I rented a car in XXXX, XXXX and return the car same location and finalized my rental payment and obtain receipt from XXXX Rent A Car for a payment of XXXX in Euro. Later on, I receive my American Express for an additional separate charge of {$65.00}. 

I called Merchant ( XXXX ) and I asked for explanation for the {$65.00} charge. The Merchant, XXXX, told me that was for a traffic citation. I asked for a copy of the citation from police, they did not have one. I asked XXXX how they charged me if they do not have citation, no expiations was provided. I told them since they do not have the citation and or proof, I will dispute the charges. 

I did file dispute with American Express, after about a month, merchant sent American Express my rental agreement with explanation of why they charge my account, WITHOUT providing any citations from police. As a result of this response, American Express took XXXX XXXX side and closed my dispute in favor of XXXX. I spoke to American Express to reopen the dispute but, they did not re-open the dispute, ( called on XX/XX/2023 at around XXXXXXXX XXXX, spoke to a person introduced himself as XXXX ).
